title: symphorema unguiculatum
intro: Symphorema unguiculatum, also known as the "Khasra" or "Khasra plant", is a medicinal plant native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Africa. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Symphorema unguiculatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. The plant is often prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
